meta.name: Scrape RSS job posts, deduplicate with Google Sheets, and send Telegram alerts

name: Scrape job posts from RSS feeds and get instant Telegram alerts with deduplication

parameters.content:
## Scrape job posts from RSS feeds and get instant Telegram alerts

Automatically monitor job boards and RSS feeds on a schedule, filter by your criteria, deduplicate results, and get instant Telegram alerts when new matching jobs are found.

### How it works
1. **Schedule Trigger** runs every 6 hours (configurable) to check for new job posts.
2. **HTTP Request** fetches job data from an RSS feed or job board API.
3. **Parse & Extract** normalizes raw data into clean job objects with title, company, location, URL, salary, tags, and posting date.
4. **Keyword Filter** matches jobs against your target roles, locations, and exclude terms — only relevant jobs pass through.
5. **Deduplication** checks each job URL against a Google Sheet of previously seen jobs. Only truly new jobs continue.
6. **Log to Sheet** saves every new job to Google Sheets for tracking and history.
7. **Telegram Alert** sends a formatted message with job details and a direct apply link.

### Setup steps
1. **Schedule** — Adjust the interval in the Schedule Trigger (default: every 6 hours).
2. **Job Source URL** — Replace the URL in the HTTP Request node with your target RSS feed or API. Examples:
   - RemoteOK: `https://remoteok.com/api`
   - Arbeitnow: `https://www.arbeitnow.com/api/job-board-api`
   - Any RSS feed from LinkedIn, Indeed, etc.
3. **Keywords** — Edit `targetRoles`, `targetLocations`, and `excludeTerms` arrays in the Keyword Filter node.
4. **Google Sheets** — Connect your credential and set the spreadsheet ID in both Sheet nodes. Create columns: Title, Company name, Location, Url, Description, Posted date, Salary, Matched Role, Scraped date.
5. **Telegram** — Create a bot via @BotFather, get your Chat ID, and connect the Telegram credential.
6. **Test** — Run manually once to verify jobs flow through correctly.

### Customization
- Add multiple HTTP Request nodes for different job boards and merge results.
- Change cron to every 1 hour for high-priority searches.
- Add salary range filtering in the keyword filter.
- Replace Telegram with Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, or email.
- Add an AI node to score/rank jobs by relevance before alerting.

## 📥 Data Source
Schedule trigger + HTTP request to fetch job posts from RSS/API

## 🔍 Parse & Filter
Extract job fields, then filter by keywords, location, and role

## 🧹 Deduplicate & Log
Check against previously seen jobs, save new ones to Google Sheets

## 📣 Alerts
Send formatted job notifications to Telegram with apply links

## ⚠️ Replace with your job board URL
Update the HTTP Request URL to your target RSS feed or API. See the main overview sticky for example URLs.

## ⚠️ Edit your keywords
Update `targetRoles`, `targetLocations`, and `excludeTerms` arrays to match your job search criteria.
